summary: Add `flight-goat-pp-cli assess`, a compound delay decision report that classifies systemic vs flight-specific risk and ranks route alternatives using AeroAPI airport conditions, disruption counts, weather, route segments, delayed-flight/inbound aircraft status, FAA NAS Status, and optional Google Flights price context.
reason: Issue #772 remained valid against the live Flight Goat CLI: digest, compare, and reliability expose useful primitives but do not produce a single passenger-facing route delay decision. The live route endpoint also returns alternatives under `flights[].segments[]`, so the shared scheduled-departure parser now flattens that shape before reliability/assess consume it. `assess` keeps upstream failures visible in `sources` and `decision.missing_evidence` so partial reports are explicit instead of being mistaken for all-clear results. FAA NOTAM data is intentionally out of scope until Flight Goat has a real NOTAM source.
validated_outcome: GOCACHE=/private/tmp/flight-goat-assess-gocache go test ./... passed for the Flight Goat module, including focused assess tests for FAA NAS XML parsing, route `flights[].segments[]` flattening, mixed systemic/flight-specific verdicts, empty route alternatives as explicit missing evidence, delayed-flight candidate selection by route/time window, dry-run request rendering, and a mocked end-to-end assess report. go build -o ./flight-goat-pp-cli ./cmd/flight-goat-pp-cli passed. CLI smoke checks confirmed `assess --help`, `which "is my delay systemic should I rebook" --limit 1` -> assess, and dry-run request disclosure. Live SFO->JFK smokes with the locally configured AeroAPI key confirmed AeroAPI airport delays/weather/disruption counts, FAA NAS Status parsing, route alternatives, inbound lookup, bounded delayed-flight selection for DAL365, partial-source 429 reporting, and Google Flights price context (150 live options returned with prices skipped/available reflected in `sources`). Post-Greptile follow-up added regression coverage for strict METAR gust detection, symmetric destination airport-delay missing evidence, empty route-segment responses, and hard signal-collection limits. Rebase follow-up added regression coverage so failed AeroAPI delay sources are not double-counted as availability misses and landed inbound aircraft report `inbound_arrived_at_origin` readiness. Validation after the rebase follow-up: focused assess tests, go test ./..., go build ./..., go vet ./..., verify_skill.py, verify_release_ledger.py --base-ref upstream/main, and git diff --check passed.
